title: AI and Coffee — 2nd Slop
recap: Small talk. But mostly vibes and AI slop. Open to all — clueless, newbie, senior, whales, sharks. Anyone interested in AI or coffee or anything in between.

title: AI and Coffee — 1st Meetup
recap: Our very first meetup. A casual post-TechTamu gathering — zero agenda, just coffee and vibes. All levels welcome: seniors, newbies, whales. We came together at Neibour Coffee House in Cyberjaya and that's where it all started.
